Apple Inc. 2024 Form 10-K

Item 1. Business

Apple designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

The company faces competitive, supply chain, and regulatory risks.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Management discusses net sales, operating expenses, liquidity, and capital resources.

Item 9A. Controls and Procedures

Disclosure controls and procedures were evaluated by management.
